title: plantago australis subsp. pflanzii
intro: Plantago australis subsp. pflanzii, also known as Pflanzer's plantain, is a subspecies of the Plantago australis species, a type of flowering plant native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is often employed to treat a variety of health issues. The medicinal properties of Pflanzer's plantain include reducing swelling and pain, as well as aiding in the treatment of respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal benefits, such as relieving coughs and sore throats, and supporting immune function.
